recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: A group of people who feel betrayed by their government and let down by their police force form a modern-day outlaw posse in order to right what they see as the wrongs of society.

recommendations.title: The Business

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Remember the Titans

recommendations.title: God Bless America
recommendations.overview: Fed up with the cruelty and stupidity of American culture, an unlikely duo goes on a killing spree, killing reality TV stars, bigots and others they find repugnant.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.
